name: Imagen
description: Generate images from a text prompt using chat completions (default) or any OpenAI-compatible Images API.

endpoint.description: API strategy: chat-completions (works with most providers) or openai-images (DALL-E /v1/images/generations).

providerId.description: Provider id in models.providers to read baseUrl/apiKey from. Ignored when baseUrl is set.

baseUrl.description: Override API base URL (with or without /v1). Example: https://api.openai.com/v1

apiKey.description: Override API key. If omitted, the plugin will still attempt the call (some backends may not require auth).

model.description: Model to use. Defaults to gpt-4o (chat-completions) or dall-e-3 (openai-images).

style.description: Optional style hint (supported by openai-images endpoint).

sendMode.description: Prefer sending as a local file or send a URL.

outputDir.description: Directory to store generated images. Defaults to <agents.defaults.workspace>/media/imagine when set, otherwise ~/.openclaw/media/imagine.
